title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Fortis Healthcare

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Fortis Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
We at Fortis Healthcare are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Raipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Fortis Healthcare:
Fortis Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fortis Healthcare!
